data.title: 40-Year Tax Attorney Reveals Millions May Qualify for Little-Known IRS Relief Status
data.description: In Atlanta on March 13, 2026, a well-known tax attorney is advising financially struggling taxpayers to explore the IRS's lesser-known "Currently Not Collectible" (CNC) designation, which can pause collection actions for eligible individuals. Charles T. Almond is emphasizing the importance of understanding this option as tax season progresses, potentially offering relief for those facing financial hardships.

data.title: Bitcoin Reclaims $72,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Jump Over 3% On Improving Sentiment
data.description: Bitcoin surged to $72,000 on Friday, with significant activity in the ETF market. Bitcoin ETFs experienced $53.9 million in net inflows on Thursday, while Ethereum ETFs saw $72.4 million in net inflows. The current prices for top cryptocurrencies are Bitcoin (BTC) at $72,320.38, Ethereum (ETH) at $2,123.98, Solana (SOL) at $90.15, XRP at $1.42, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.09978, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.056156. Meme coins saw a market capitalization spike of 10.1%, reaching $34.8 billion in the past 24 hours. Analysts at Bitfinex noted a 6% increase in Bitcoin post Operation Epic Fury, contrasting with the performance of the S&P 500 index. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Longsys Showcased AI-Driven Storage Solutions at Embedded World 2026
data.description: In Nuremberg, Germany on March 13, 2026, Longsys (301308.SZ), a leading semiconductor memory company, showcased its cutting-edge storage solutions at Embedded World 2026. The presentation highlighted the company's prowess in integrated storage innovation and showcased its dual business model value with the theme "AI Storage for Embedded World." Notably, Longsys emphasized its focus on automotive-grade solutions during the event.

data.title: Andreas Szakacs Productions Launches Shadow Fist with Strategic Film Financing Model
data.description: In London on March 13, 2026, it was reported that the landscape of independent film production is undergoing significant changes, transitioning into a more strategic, investment-focused sector. Andreas Szakacs, under his company Andreas Szakacs Productions, revealed the launch of "Shadow Fist," their inaugural narrative feature. This film marks a pivotal moment for Szakacs Productions as they delve into the realm of independent filmmaking.

data.title: WeRide Inc. Announces Results of Extraordinary General Meeting, Class A Meeting and Class B Meeting
data.description: On March 13, 2026, WeRide Inc., a prominent company in autonomous driving technology, revealed that all Proposed Resolutions presented for approval at the extraordinary general meeting in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, China, have been accepted. The Company's stock is listed on Nasdaq as WRD and on HKEx as 0800. This news was specified in notices dated February 6, 2026, for the general meeting, Class A meeting, and Class B meeting. The resolutions were approved during the gatherings held in Beijing on that day.

data.title: Activate Energy Acquisition Corp. Announces Filing of Annual Report for Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: Energy company Activate Energy Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: AEAQ) has reported the filing of its Annual Report for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025. This financial document provides an insight into the company's performance, financial status, and other essential information. It is a crucial regulatory requirement for companies listed on the stock exchange to disclose their annual financial reports. Shareholders and potential investors can analyze this report to make informed decisions based on the company's financial health and prospects for future growth.

data.title: SAIC Board of Directors Declares Cash Dividend
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Science Applications International Corp (NASDAQ: SAIC) based in Reston, Virginia, declared a cash dividend of $0.37 per share for its common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on April 24, 2026, to stockholders who are on record as of April 10, 2026.

data.title: ThunderSoft Showcases Edge AI Innovations at embedded world 2026, Highlighting the Rise of Intelligent Edge Systems
data.description: Concluding in Nuremberg, Germany on March 13, 2026, embedded world 2026 highlighted the notable trend of rapid growth in intelligent edge systems. Throughout the exhibition halls, it was evident that the integration of high-performance computing, on-device AI, and industry-specific technologies is gaining momentum.

data.title: YY Group Welcomes The Landmark Bangkok to Growing Hospitality Client Portfolio
data.description: A recent partnership for manpower outsourcing is propelling YY Circle Thailand towards significant growth, contributing to the Company's promising revenue projections for 2026. YY Group Holding Limited (NASDAQ: YYGH), a renowned player in on-demand workforce solutions, made the announcement today from Singapore. This collaboration marks a crucial milestone for YY Circle Thailand as they pave the way for expansion and increased market presence. With this new contract in place, the Company anticipates a substantial boost in revenue, showcasing their commitment to sustainable progress and success in the industry.
